items.title: Edinburgh University (Transfer of Patronage) Act 1897
items.description: An Act for transferring the right of Presentation to the Professorships of Botany and Natural History in the University of Edinburgh.

items.title: Metropolitan Police Courts (Holidays) Act 1897
items.description: An Act for enabling the Metropolitan Police Courts to be closed on Special Bank Holidays.

items.title: Preferential Payments in Bankruptey Amendment Act 1897
Mersey Channels Act 1897 (repealed 1.1.1996)
items.description: An Act to make Rules for preventing Collisions in the Sea Channels leading to the River Mersey.

items.title: Metropolitan Police Courts Act 1897
items.description: An Act for transferring the Expenses of Police Courts to the Metropolitan Police Fund, and for making provision with respect to the Courts of the Stipendiary-Magistrate of Chatham and Sheerness.

items.title: Poor Law Officers Superannuation Act Amendment Act 1897
Police (Property) Act 1897
items.description: An Act to make further provision with respect to the Disposal of Property in the Possession of the Police.

items.title: Cleansing of Persons Act 1897
items.description: An Act to permit Local Authorities to provide Cleansing and Disinfection for Persons infested with Vermin.

items.title: Isle of Man (Church Building and New Parishes) Act 1897
items.description: An Act to remove doubts as to the applicability of the Church Building Acts and New Parishes Acts to the Isle of Man.

items.title: Public Health (Scotland) Act 1897
items.description: An Act to consolidate and amend the Laws relating to the Public Health in Scotland.

items.title: District Councils (Water Supply Facilities) Act 1897
items.description: An Act for giving Facilities for a Pure Water Supply in Rural Districts.

items.title: Congested Districts (Scotland) Act 1897
items.description: An Act to provide for the administration of Sums available for the Improvement of Congested Districts in the Highlands and Islands of Scotland.

items.title: Merchant Shipping Act 1897 (repealed 1.1.1996)
items.description: An Act to amend the Merchant Shipping Act, 1894, with respect to the Power of Detention for undermanning.

items.title: Military Lands Act 1897
items.description: An Act to amend the Military Lands Act, 1892.

items.title: Foreign Prison-Made Goods Act 1897
items.description: An Act to prohibit the Importation of Foreign Prison-made Goods.
